info.name: Main Dashboard Module API Collection
info.description: API collection for Main Dashboard module. This module aggregates data from all types of usulan (Gedung, Jalan, Saluran) for display in the main dashboard. Returns id_usulan, id_jenis_usulan, id_asb_status, nama_usulan, reject_info, and createdAt.

variable.description: Base URL for the API server
JWT access token obtained from login
API prefix (api/dev/v1 for development, api/v1 for production)

query.description: Number of items per page (optional, default: 10)

request.description: Get all main dashboard entries with optional search and pagination. Results are ordered by createdAt DESC. Returns data from all types of usulan (Gedung, Jalan, Saluran). Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
    "status": "success",
    "responseCode": 200,
    "message": "Main Dashboard list retrieved successfully",
    "data": {
        "data": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "idUsulan": 1,
                "idJenisUsulan": 1,
                "idAsbStatus": 1,
                "namaUsulan": "Pembangunan Gedung A",
                "rejectInfo": null,
                "createdAt": "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z"
            },
            {
                "id": 2,
                "idUsulan": 2,
                "idJenisUsulan": 2,
                "idAsbStatus": 2,
                "namaUsulan": "Pembangunan Jalan Raya",
                "rejectInfo": "Tidak memenuhi syarat teknis",
                "createdAt": "2024-01-14T09:20:00.000Z"
            }
        ],
        "total": 100,
        "page": 1,
        "limit": 10,
        "totalPages": 10
    }
}

request.description: Get main dashboard entries filtered by search term. The search parameter performs a wildcard (LIKE) search on nama_usulan field (case-insensitive).
Get main dashboard entries with pagination. Results are ordered by createdAt DESC.
